title: Hat Yai, Songkhla — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hat Yai, Songkhla: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hat Yai is a city in Songkhla with a population of 400,000. The commercial hub of southern Thailand, popular with Malaysian visitors and expats, offering a multicultural atmosphere and very affordable living.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
